personal_information.name: Than Htike Zaw
personal_information.title: Software Engineer
personal_information.summary: Full-stack web developer with more than three years of experience building scalable and maintainable web applications using modern web technologies. Specializes in developing robust backend systems and intuitive frontend interfaces.

Designed and integrated APIs for communication between frontend and backend.
Collaborated using Agile methodologies with cross-functional teams.
Participated in the full software development lifecycle (requirements, planning, code reviews, testing, delivery).
Implemented bug fixes, performance improvements, and feature enhancements.
Optimized relational database queries.
Leveraged AI-assisted development tools.
Designed and developed backend systems for CMS and School Management Systems.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs for user management, roles, permissions, records, and content.
Implemented JWT and role-based access control.
Optimized database schemas and queries.
Collaborated with frontend developers for API integration.
Deployed and maintained services using Docker and cloud infrastructure.
Developed full-stack applications including POS, e-commerce, and restaurant management systems.
Built backend services and RESTful APIs using Laravel.
Developed responsive frontend interfaces using React.
Designed and optimized database schemas.
Containerized applications using Docker and Docker Compose.
Managed deployments using Nginx and CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions.
Designed and developed backend systems for CMS and School Management Systems.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs for user management, roles, permissions, records, and content.

projects.title: Hotel Booking System
projects.summary: A high-performance full-stack hotel booking platform featuring a customer booking interface, admin dashboard, and real-time WebSocket notifications.
projects.description: A comprehensive hotel search, reservation, and management platform. It leverages React Query for optimized client-side state and caching, and includes an advanced real-time notification system backed by an AWS CDK WebSocket infrastructure (API Gateway WebSocket API, Lambda, and DynamoDB).
features: Hotel search and multi-criteria filtering (location, rating, country, etc.)
Interactive map integration with React Leaflet for geographical hotel tracking
Complete guest booking lifecycle with room selection and check-in/out scheduling
Fully-featured Admin Dashboard for managing hotels, rooms, and bookings
Real-time alerts & badges using AWS WebSocket connections synchronized via React Query cache
Secure credential-based authentication and role-based route guard middleware
Automated CI/CD pipelines deploying to VPS with database migration and pm2 reloads

projects.title: Loan Management System with RBAC
projects.summary: A secure, enterprise-grade loan tracking and management system utilizing granular role-based access controls (RBAC).
projects.description: An administrative platform designed for managing, approving, and auditing loans. It incorporates a strict Spatie-style Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model with custom permission checks, built on top of a Node.js/Express backend and a responsive React frontend featuring advanced table rendering and data mutation hooks.
features: Granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) protecting UI elements and API routes
Spatie-style checkPermissions middleware implementing module-specific permissions (e.g. read, write, approve)
Dynamic loan application, verification, approval, and disbursement workflows
Advanced data visualization and filtering with TanStack Table integration
Optimized server state synchronization using TanStack React Query
Robust input schema validation with Zod and secure JWT authentication tokens
Relational database design managed cleanly with TypeORM schemas and migrations
